steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The colon defines: “it has no direct bearing on whether the claim is true.” The blank needs a word for something that is not relevant to determining truth.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content:
”Irrelevant” means something without bearing on or connection to a matter — the definition the colon provides. The other three refer to different concepts: what is unstated or implied (“implicit”), what is unquestionable (“indisputable”), or what is unclear (“indistinct”).

This matches choice D — D is correct.
